strategy_snapshot.topology: AWS Cloud + GenAI Layer (Bedrock) + Custom Silicon (Trainium 3) + Project Leo (Satellite)
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: AI Margin Expansion via internal silicon vs Nvidia Blackwell + Enterprise Cloud Reacceleration
